findings.explanation: Expected — nulls correspond to open tickets. Status column confirms 39 open, 40 closed.
findings.action: Note in caveats; no mitigation needed.

findings.issue: Events window starts 2025-03-07; 35/79 tickets (44%) predate events coverage
findings.explanation: Pre-signal analysis (H4) cannot be performed for early tickets.
findings.action: Restrict H4 analysis to tickets opened >= 2025-03-07 (44 tickets). Caveat in report.

findings.issue: Only 9/50 accounts (18%) are non-complainers — very small control group
findings.explanation: 82% complaint rate limits statistical power for all binary hypotheses.
findings.action: Reframe primary grouping as ticket-volume buckets (0, 1-2, 3+). Caveat all binary comparisons.
